sql_overrides.sql_query:
SELECT
  expenditure_item_id,
  line_num,
  creation_date,
  created_by,
  transfer_status_code,
  quantity,
  billable_flag,
  program_update_date,
  pa_date,
  dr_code_combination_id,
  gl_date,
  recvr_gl_date,
  reversed_flag,
  org_id,
  project_id,
  task_id,
  denom_currency_code,
  denom_raw_cost,
  DENOM_BURDENED_COST,
  project_currency_code,
  project_rate_date,
  project_rate_type,
  project_exchange_rate,
  projfunc_cost_exchange_rate,
  work_type_id,
  --xah.period_name as recvr_gl_period_name,
  recvr_gl_period_name,
  --pcdl.pa_period_name as recvr_pa_period_name,
  recvr_pa_period_name,
  projfunc_cost_rate_type,
  projfunc_cost_rate_date,
  projfunc_currency_code,
  expenditure_item_date,
  expenditure_type,
  expenditure_organization_id,
  job_id,
  system_linkage_function,
  --  peia.inventory_item_id,
  NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
  --  DECODE(peia.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, NULL,PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE,peia.UNIT_OF_MEASURE)  unit_of_measure,
  -- PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE,  -- PC:  is this the right substitute?
  NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
  --pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id,
  INCURRED_BY_HR_ID,
  incurred_by_organization_id,
  --pa_expenditures_all.entered_by_person_id,
  --entered_by.attribute9 as ENTERED_BY_HR_ID
  0 as entered_by,
  vendor_id,
  period_set_name,
  period_set_name1,
  --  pa_project_assignments.project_role_id,
  NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID,
  NULL resource_organization_id,
  non_labor_resource,
  resource_class,  
  wip_resource_id,
  line_type,
  PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,
  PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  PROJECT_RAW_COST,
  PROJECT_BURDENED_COST,
  raw_cost_rate,
  burden_cost_rate,
  bill_job_id,
  transaction_source,
  PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE, 
  '0' AS X_CUSTOM,
  attribute8,
  denom_raw_cost1,
  cost_burden_distributed_flag,
  bill_hold_flag,
  0 AS BURDEN_COST,
  cost_dist_rejection_code,
  cc_cross_charge_code,
  cc_ic_processed_code,
  bill_job_billing_title,
  attribute2,
  attribute5,
  cc_cross_charge_type,
  Controlling_PU,
  --api.invoice_num,
  '0' AS INVOICE_NUM, 
  --api.invoice_date,
  INVOICE_DATE, 
  --poh.segment1 as po_num,
  '0' as po_num,
  non_labor_resource1,
  segment3,
  cc_prvdr_organization_id,
  cc_recvr_organization_id,
  attribute3,
  func_currency_code,
  FUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  FUNC_RAW_COST,
  customer_id,
  ae_line_num,
  source_type,
  ae_header_id,
  X_CONVERSION_NAME,
  X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID,
  X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE
 ,JEG_MV_COST_ELIM1.X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE as X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE
    ,JEG_MV_COST_ELIM1.X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE as X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE							   
										
FROM   JEG_MV_COST_ELIM1

-----------------------------------
  -- COST ELIMINATION
 -----------------------------------
SELECT  
  expenditure_item_id,
  line_num,
  creation_date,
  created_by,
  transfer_status_code, 
  quantity,
  billable_flag,
  program_update_date,
  pa_date,
  COST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
  gl_date,
  recvr_gl_date,
  reversed_flag,
  org_id,
  project_id,
  null as task_id,
  null as denom_currency_code,
  denom_raw_cost,
  denom_burdened_cost,
  project_currency_code,
  project_rev_rate_date,
  project_rev_rate_type,
  project_exchange_rate,
  projfunc_exchange_rate,
  null as work_type_id,                                    
  recvr_gl_period_name,
  recvr_pa_period_name,
  projfunc_cost_rate_type,
  projfunc_cost_rate_date,
  projfunc_currency_code,  
  null as expenditure_item_date,
  expenditure_type,  
  null as expenditure_org_id, 
  null as job_id, 
  system_linkage_function,  
  null as inventory_item_id,
  unit_of_measure, 
  incurred_by_person_id,
  incurred_by_org_id,
  entered_by_person_id, 
  vendor_id, 
  pa_period_set_name,
  gl_period_set_name,
  null as project_role_id, 
  null as resource_org_id, 
  null as non_labor_resource, 
  null as resource_class,
  WIP_RESOURCE_ID,
  line_type, 
  PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,
  PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  PROJECT_RAW_COST,  
  PROJECT_BURDENED_COST,  
  null as raw_cost_rate, 
  null as burden_cost_rate, 
  bill_job_id, 
  transaction_source, 
  project_type_class_code, 
  x_custom, 
  null as attribute8,
  denom_raw_cost, 
  cost_burden_distributed_flag, 
  bill_hold_flag, 
  burden_cost,
  null as cost_dist_rejection_code,
  null as cc_cross_charge_code, 
  null as cc_ic_processed_code, 
  bill_job_billing_title,
  attribute2,
  attribute5,
  cross_charge_type,
  control_pu,
  null as invoice_num, 
  null as invoice_date, 
  null as po_num,
  null as non_labor_resource, 
  charged_pu,
  null as cc_prvdr_org_id,
  null as cc_recvr_org_id, 
  null as job_id, 
  func_curr_code, 
  func_burdened_cost, 
  func_raw_cost,
  task_customer_id, 
  ae_line_num,
  source_type,
  ae_header_id,
  null as USER_NAME,
  null as X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID,
  null as X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE
	 ,JEG_MV_COST_ELIM.X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE
  ,NULL AS X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE																
FROM 
JEG_MV_COST_ELIM
